channel.title: Enterprise AI on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Enterprise AI on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: ai: From Building Agents to Working with Them: Enterprise Agent Distribution in Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry shifts focus from agent creation to distribution, emphasizing the enterprise problem of getting AI agents into users’ hands and operating in business workflows. The post frames deployment and adoption of agents as the new bottleneck after rapid progress in agent development.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog
